en_US: Grunt 1: Hey! Hold it right there!
You followed us all the way up here?
You’ve got some nerve.
Grunt 2: Commander Charon was clear.
Nobody goes up this mountain but us.
Grunt 1: So we’ll do this two-on-one!
Try squirming out of that!
Grunt 2: ...Wait. One Pokémon?
That’s all you can put up?
Grunt 1: Forget it. Two on one is
one thing. Two on a half is just sad.
Come back when you’ve got a team.
We’re not going anywhere.
Grunt 1: Two of us!
Two of us, and you still...
Charon’s going to have our heads.
I’m not sticking around for that!
Grunt 2: ...You didn’t see us.
Nobody came up here. Got it?
The old man can have his mountain.
I’m going home.
